sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current position of orange/blue bars after 2 UPs
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for i in [10, 11]:
    an = after[i]
    br = [p[0] for p in an['boundary']]
    ar = [p[1] for p in an['boundary']]
    print(f'Node {i} ({an["color"]}): r={min(br)}-{max(br)} c={min(ar)}-{max(ar)}')
# Target blue shape
for i in [4]:
    an = after[4]
    br = [p[0] for p in an['boundary']]
    ar = [p[1] for p in an['boundary']]
    print(f'Target (node 4): r={min(br)}-{max(br)} c={min(ar)}-{max(ar)}')
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
